info.title: WineMarket API
info.description: Backend API for the WineMarket platform.

tags.description: Shopping cart management for guests and users
tags.name: carts

tags.description: Product and winemaker reviews and ratings
tags.name: reviews

get.description: Returns the caller's user record with their roles. If no local row exists yet, one is lazily created from Clerk profile data on first call.

put.description: Updates the first or last name of the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the shipping and billing addresses linked to the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new address and links it as the shipping or billing address for the authenticated user. Replaces any previously linked address of the same type.
post.summary: Set a shipping or billing address

post.description: Submit a request to become a winemaker or shop owner.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted shops with their addresses.

post.description: Creates a new shop for the authenticated shop owner.

get.description: Returns all shops owned by the authenticated user.
Returns a single shop with address. 404 if not found or deleted.

patch.description: Update name, description, or address of own shop.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted products. Filterable by price, rating, type, etc.
Returns a single product with its underlying wines.
Returns all products belonging to a specific shop.

post.description: Creates a single wine product in a shop.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a product and reverts stock allocations.

post.description: Creates a wine bundle in a shop.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a bundle and reverts stock allocations.

get.description: Returns regular schedule and one-off exceptions for the shop.
Returns the cart for the authenticated user or guest session.

post.summary: Post a comment on an event

post.description: Create an order from the current cart. Works for both authenticated users and guests.

get.description: Returns an order by ID. Only the owning user can access it.
Returns all non-deleted wines. Filterable by region, type, color, vintageYear, winemakerId.

post.description: Creates a wine under the authenticated winemaker profile.

get.description: Returns a single wine with winemaker info. 404 if not found or deleted.

put.description: Full replacement of a wine. Must be own wine or admin.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a wine. Must be own wine or admin.

post.description: Creates a new anonymous session record and returns the session ID in the response body. Used for guest carts and temporary state.

get.description: Returns metadata for an existing guest session if it has not expired.

post.description: A shop owner requests a supply agreement from a winemaker.

patch.description: A winemaker approves or rejects a supply agreement request.
patch.summary: Respond to a supply agreement request

get.summary: List supply agreements for a shop
List supply agreements for the authenticated winemaker

get.description: Returns all reviews for a product with rating breakdown.

post.description: Creates a review for a product. Must have purchased it.

get.description: Returns all reviews for a winemaker.

post.description: Creates a review for a winemaker profile.

delete.description: Deletes a review. Must be owner or admin.

get.description: List events by status for moderation.
List users with optional status and role filters.
List all reviews across the platform.
List images for a wine. Public.

post.description: Upload an image for a wine. Requires ownership or admin.

delete.description: Delete an image from a wine. Requires ownership or admin.

get.description: List images for a shop. Public.

post.description: Upload an image for a shop. Requires ownership or admin.

delete.description: Delete an image from a shop. Requires ownership or admin.

get.description: List images for a product. Public.

post.description: Upload an image for a product. Requires ownership or admin.

delete.description: Delete an image from a product. Requires ownership or admin.

get.description: List images for a winemaker. Public.

post.description: Upload an image for a winemaker. Requires ownership or admin.

delete.description: Delete an image from a winemaker. Requires ownership or admin.

get.description: List images for a event. Public.

post.description: Upload an image for a event. Requires ownership or admin.

delete.description: Delete an image from a event. Requires ownership or admin.
